description_long: This is an elegant, vintage-style chaise with a deep burgundy leather or faux leather upholstery and a solid, dark wood frame. The backrest features a gently undulating, scalloped design with subtle button tufting, adding a touch of sophistication. Both armrests are rolled and curve outward, matching the ornate cabriole legs that support the piece. The seat is wide and ribbed, providing ample space for lounging, and is adorned with four decorative cushions—two round with patterned fabric and two square in a darker tone. The rear of the chaise is fully enclosed with a smooth, polished wooden panel, giving it a refined and finished appearance. This piece would be well-suited for upscale urban environments such as hotel lobbies, stylish waiting areas, or residential porches.
description: A vintage-style burgundy chaise with a scalloped, tufted backrest, rolled armrests, cabriole legs, and decorative cushions, featuring a polished wooden frame.
description_view_0: Front view shows the scalloped, tufted backrest, rolled armrests, ribbed seat, and four decorative cushions.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the outward curve of the armrest, the thickness of the seat, and the cabriole leg profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, polished wooden back panel and the undulating top edge of the backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the first side, showing the armrest, seat depth, and leg design.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is medium-height with a scalloped, undulating top edge and subtle button tufting, giving it a classic, decorative appearance. It is fully upholstered and smoothly transitions into the armrests.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both left and right armrests are present, rolled outward in a traditional style and integrated with the frame.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are cabriole-style, made of dark polished wood, with a gentle outward curve and a refined, classic finish.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid burgundy with ribbed seat detailing and subtle button tufting on the backrest. The cushions feature patterned fabric with geometric and floral motifs.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are four loose cushions: two round patterned ones and two square dark ones, arranged symmetrically along the backrest for both comfort and decoration.
